sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49060" key="*qra/swn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Θράσων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ωνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a name of a <sense id="n49060.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">braggart</tr_> soldier in New Com.</sense> </entryFree>
